detail.description:
Welcome back to Tricky Story 2 – the sequel where the puzzles are trickier and the stories are even crazier!

Everything you loved about the first game is back, but with a whole new level of "Wait, what?!" moments. Challenge your logic, sharpen your wit, and get ready for the ultimate brain workout that doesn't take itself too seriously.

What’s New in Part 2:

Brand-New Levels: Fresh brain-teasers that will keep you guessing.
Epic Plot Twists: Each level tells a hilarious story where nothing is
detail.releaseNotes: We have updated new levels and fixed performance-related issues
